name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Restored full info-block visibility on long_position widget — Closed P&L, Qty, R:R, $-amounts, %-offsets all visible (matches the user's expected widget shape). infoBlocks isolated in its own setProperties call so a single rejected sibling field can't drop the whole properties update. Dropped unsupported `compact`/`alwaysShowStats`/`profitBackground` from the post-create batch. Earlier: lotSize/accountSize/leverage/risk for correct qty math; bare-minimum create-call payload to avoid silent null returns; unified win/loss geometry; trail line at placed stop.
